title: Replace all 'EduManage' branding with 'Nirgrantha' across post-login pages and footer

requirements.text: Find and replace every occurrence of 'EduManage' (including variations like 'EduManage.', 'EDUMANAGE') with 'Nirgrantha' in all post-login frontend components, including but not limited to: the footer component (which currently shows '© 2026 EduManage. All rights reserved.'), the SmartCampus Connect logo area, dashboard shells (StudentDashboard.tsx, FacultyIntelligenceHub.tsx, InstituteCommandCenter.tsx, ParentInsightPortal.tsx), and any sub-components under frontend/src/components/tabs/. No instance of 'EduManage' should appear anywhere in the rendered UI after login.

quotes: after loin page ,the footer page is same edumanage change it to Nirgrantha i dont want anywere to see edumanage chnage to Nirgrantha

acceptanceCriteria: The post-login footer reads '© 2026 Nirgrantha. All rights reserved.' instead of '© 2026 EduManage. All rights reserved.'
No text, label, copyright notice, or any UI element anywhere in the app displays 'EduManage' after the change
All dashboard headers, footers, and sub-pages show 'Nirgrantha' branding consistently
The SmartCampus Connect logo area in the footer does not reference 'EduManage'
Searching the entire frontend source for the string 'EduManage' (case-insensitive) returns zero matches in rendered output

constraints: Do not alter any immutable paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui
Do not change any backend logic
Only branding text must change — do not alter layout, styling, or functionality
nonGoals: Changing any design tokens, colors, or visual theme
